title: Warm Dense French Muffins
description: Indulge in these rich and briny muffins filled with sweet candy, perfect for a low-fat friendly treat, these muffins are a delight to enjoy with a warm beverage.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar, eggs, and milk.
Add the melted butter to the wet ingredients and whisk until combined.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Gently fold in the candy pieces.
Divide the batter evenly among 12 muffin cups.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the muffins are golden brown.
Remove the muffins from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the muffins warm and enjoy.
